title: A novel caputo fractional model for english language learning: Analysis and simulation with bayesian regularization approach
author: Maria, Abbasi, et al.

steps.title: Stability Analysis of Model
steps.instruction: In this section, we prove the stability of the fractional model. Various stability classes have been used to study the English model. Recently, several researchers have employed HU-type stability for simulations since it provides an approximation answer for difficult issues. for additional information regarding HU stability. To simplify, we first demonstrate the HU stability of model (3.2).

description: A new Caputo fractional-order model is presented in this work to examine the dynamics of English language acquisition. The approach creates a strong computational framework for researching language acquisition by combining Bayesian Regularization Artificial Neural Networks (BRA-NNs), fractional calculus, and stochastic analyzers.
